creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-10 22:40:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/parcellite Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    deskutils/parcellite/files patch-po_Makefile.in.in 
  Log:
  Parcellite is a lightweight GTK+ clipboard manager. This is a stripped down,
  basic-features-only clipboard manager with a small memory footprint for those
  who like simplicity.
  
  WWW: http://parcellite.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/134255
  Submitted by:   Joey Mingrone <joey at mingrone.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.364     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/deskutils/parcellite/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/parcellite/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/deskutils/parcellite/files/patch-po_Makefile.in.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/deskutils/parcellite/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/deskutils/parcellite/pkg-plist (new)
